channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: US Users Barred From KuCoin After $500K CFTC Settlement
item.description: A federal court order has permanently prohibited the exchange from serving U.S. customers unless it registers.

item.title: OpenFX raises $94M to speed up cross-border payments with stablecoins
item.description: OpenFX raised $94 million in a Series A round to expand its stablecoin-based FX network, as firms explore faster cross-border payment infrastructure.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bitcoin Cash (BCH) gains 1.5% as index trades flat
item.description: NEAR Protocol (NEAR), up 1.9% from Monday, joined Bitcoin Cash (BCH) as a top performer.

item.title: Ethereum’s EEZ and the attempt to rebuild one Ethereum
item.description: The Ethereum Economic Zone promises to stitch fragmented rollups back into a single system, but a similar model struggled to gain traction on Cosmos.

item.title: Uniblock Raises $5.2M to Unify Blockchain Infrastructure
item.description: The platform handles routing and failover for 3,000 projects across more than 300 chains through a single API.

item.title: Chainalysis Introduces the First Blockchain Intelligence Agents
item.description: Bad actors are already using AI to accelerate fraud, theft, money laundering, and more. We need to move fast to… The post Chainalysis Introduces the First Blockchain Intelligence Agents appeared first on Chainalysis .

item.title: Chainalysis adds 'natural language' AI agents to its blockchain investigation platform
item.description: CEO Jonathan Levin says it marks a "really important moment" for making such analysis more accessible as the crypto industry grows with non-native entrants.

item.title: Coinbase’s Base to focus on tokenized markets, stablecoins, developers this year
item.description: The move comes as the chain distances itself from Optimism technology and toward in-house infrastructure as it seeks greater independence and scale.

item.title: AI agents like OpenClaw could drain crypto wallets via ‘malicious skills’: CertiK
item.description: CertiK has advised ordinary users “who are not security professionals, developers, or experienced geeks” against installing and using OpenClaw.

item.title: Base joins Ethereum, Tron, others in betting big on AI agent future
item.description: Coinbase's Ethereum layer-2 Base said it will be upgrading its chain to allow AI agents to use it the same way developers or traders would.

item.title: Downside risk remains as bitcoin nears record-tying six-month losing streak
item.description: A close below $67,300 for bitcoin would confirm six straight monthly losses amid ongoing macro pressures.

item.title: Crypto dispute over Resupply exploit lands in Singapore harassment court
item.description: A Singapore court ordered OneKey founder Wang Lei and an X user to stop threatening or defamatory claims tied to a dispute over the 2025 Resupply exploit.

item.title: Is $450B in Bitcoin vulnerable to the quantum threat? Analysts weigh in
item.description: BTC price will find it difficult to establish a new record high if Bitcoin developers don't take the quantum threats seriously, one analyst says.

item.title: Saw some people panicking or asking about quantum computing's impact on crypto. At a high level, all crypto has to do is to upgrade to Quantum-Resistant (Post-Quantum) Algorithms. So, no need to panic. 😂 In practice, there are some execution consideratio - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE9rZGxHYlVPNXdwZHJJMzdIaFk0RUxoUlQxOGRDLXpqS2FiMG9nUHU2ekZ0Ty1VdHEyQ253Y2szaEs0NDR3VzNYRWdmZDc0d05OekJYMG9MNXc2c1c3TVVmQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Saw some people panicking or asking …

item.title: Faster settlement may make for poorer markets
item.description: Atomic settlement demands instant capital per trade. T+0 eliminates netting efficiency while empowering liquidity coordinators.

item.title: Standard Chartered says faster stablecoin turnover could curb demand
item.description: Stablecoin turnover has doubled in the past two years as AI payments and traditional finance use cases grow, though Standard Chartered still sees the market reaching $2 trillion.

item.title: Google Quantum Paper Boosts Odds of Bitcoin ‘Q-Day’ by 2032, Researchers Warn
item.description: Google warned that quantum advances could break crypto security sooner than expected, with analysts recommending ‘appropriate urgency.’

item.title: Google warns five quantum attack paths could put $100 billion on Ethereum at risk
item.description: A 57-page whitepaper identifies how future quantum computers could target Ethereum's wallets, smart contracts, staking system, Layer 2 networks and data verification layer, with combined exposure exceeding $100 billion.

item.title: Prediction markets backlash builds possible stormcloud for 2027
item.description: Odds favor a Democratic rise in Congress next year, when lawmakers who've begun going after firms such as Kalshi and Polymarket may have greater sway.

item.title: Bitcoin Holds $66K as Trump Prioritizes Iran War Exit Over Reopening Hormuz
item.description: Bitcoin held $66,000 as Trump reportedly pivoted to an Iran war exit, with analysts eyeing $90,000 if a potential de-escalation holds.

item.title: Supply chain attack hits Axios npm releases, users urged to rotate keys
item.description: Security companies flagged axios@1.14.1 and 0.30.4 as compromised, urging credential rotation and rollback of affected packages.

item.title: Forex startup OpenFX raises $94 million to expand stablecoin-powered cross-border payments
item.description: The company acts as a bridge between traditional banking and digital assets, enabling faster and cheaper foreign-exchange conversions for businesses moving large sums of money.

item.title: CoinDCX plans anti-fraud push after founders cleared in impersonation case
item.description: After an Indian court found no case against CoinDCX’s founders, the Coinbase-backed exchange said it will roll out an anti-fraud network to tackle impersonation and cyber fraud.

item.title: Bitcoin whale selling cools as $60K becomes the focus for BTC price
item.description: Bitcoin whale selling eased as BTC exchange inflows dropped sharply, making the trend line near $59,000 the critical support level to watch.

item.title: Quantum risk resurfaces at the worst time for bitcoin, but 1 token is loving it
item.description: Your day-ahead look for March 31, 2026

item.title: 🚨 DUBAI CRACKS DOWN ON LEVERAGE CRYPTO TRADING Dubai’s VARA has introduced strict new rules covering margin, leverage, governance and risk controls for crypto derivatives trading. Firms must now clearly disclose risks and ensure users are qu - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE15bEdaSnpobmkzMlU0SlhDc1d2RHFxaUFtNFozWTB6MEdDd1BvQU5tMHNYZlRKbldMX3JSdTlUOV9FeHBiWXFkckZHdTRIaWJjclBqZ05qRG4xV3Q0VnVKMA?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 DUBAI CRACKS DOWN ON LEVERAGE CRY…

item.title: A quantum computer may need just 10,000 qubits to empty your crypto wallets, researchers say
item.description: The research shows quantum computers may break bitcoin and ether wallet encryption with far fewer qubits than previously thought, accelerating the push toward post-quantum security.

item.title: Dynamic adds embedded wallet infrastructure to TON for Telegram apps
item.description: The integration lets developers deploy TON wallets automatically inside Telegram Mini Apps, removing the need to build and manage wallet infrastructure.

item.title: Russia moves to narrow crypto trading to regulated intermediaries
item.description: Russia approved a draft crypto bill package that would push trading through licensed intermediaries and cap retail purchases at $3,700 annually.

item.title: Bearish sentiment builds in crypto as volatility and hedging rise
item.description: Bitcoin’s brief rally faded amid war-driven oil price surge, rising volatility and declining futures interest, signaling growing caution across crypto markets.

item.title: Bitcoin price dips below $66K ahead of US Defense Department briefing
item.description: Bitcoin trapped late buyers at $68,000 with oil still above $100 ahead of a news briefing by US Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth.

item.title: Crypto market maker Keyrock reaches $1.1B valuation in SC Ventures-led round
item.description: Standard Chartered’s venture arm led the round as Keyrock looks to expand products, pursue acquisitions and scale its global footprint.

item.title: David Bailey’s Nakamoto sells roughly 5% of its bitcoin holdings, offloading 284 BTC
item.description: The sale underscores liquidity pressures as the company continues its pivot to a bitcoin treasury strategy.

item.title: F2Pool co-founder says Thailand condo bought for 2,900 Bitcoin sold for 7
item.description: F2Pool co-founder Wang Chun’s decision to sell a Thai condo once bought for 2,900 BTC for just 7 BTC illustrates the opportunity cost of spending Bitcoin early.

item.title: Hashdex’s diversified crypto ETF adds options for hedging, income generation
item.description: Options on Hashdex’s diversified NCIQ ETF now let investors hedge, generate income and manage risk across a broad basket of digital assets.

item.title: Nakamoto sells $20 million in Bitcoin and cuts Metaplanet stake
item.description: David Bailey's Nakamoto plans to wind down healthcare operations as it shifts focus to integrating BTC Inc and UTXO Management.

item.title: Crypto investment firm Keyrock valued at $1.1 billion in Series C led by SC Ventures
item.description: The Brussels-based digital asset firm said the new capital will bolster its balance sheet and support expansion and acquisitions.

item.title: 🚨 THIS IS ABSOLUTELY WILD Google just released a quantum paper, and it's really a nightmare. Here's what you need to know: - Breaking crypto encryption now only requires 500,000 qubits. That’s 20 times less than what experts previously thought was nee - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE5fXzJ1bjFkUDc1d09tcUt3SG96amxkVExORUhGaG16d2Z4N2FDLUxRTV9KclMzck5OUHRVNDFuSnNFdWVESFNzT0F3bHh0NjQwUUZEWERoeU9VZXRZVXpR?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 THIS IS ABSOLUTELY WILD Google just…

item.title: Democrats press CFTC, ethics watchdog on prediction market insider trading
item.description: Prediction markets are facing increasing scrutiny over allegations of insider trading, prompting Kalshi and Polymarket to plan guardrails to curb potential incidents.

item.title: Bitcoin demand falters as 'real' interest rates surge
item.description: Rising U.S. real yields, especially on 10-year TIPS, pose a headwind to zero-yielding risk assets like bitcoin.

item.title: Crypto exchange KuCoin agrees to $500K settlement, ending CFTC case
item.description: KuCoin’s parent will pay $500,000 to settle CFTC charges following a separate $300 million penalty in a DOJ case over similar conduct.

item.title: Quantum computers need fewer qubits to crack crypto than thought: Google
item.description: Google has updated its estimates of the quantum computing resources needed to break elliptic curve cryptography.

item.title: Bitcoin holds $67,500 as Trump signals he may end Iran war with Hormuz still shut
item.description: Equity futures rallied and oil erased gains on the report, but the S&P 500 is on its longest losing streak since 2022 and MSCI Asia Pacific is heading for its worst month since 2008.

item.title: New US Rule Seeks to Open $8T Retirement Market to Crypto
item.description: The safe harbor proposal would allow 401(k) managers to offer crypto-linked funds with stronger legal protections.

item.title: Maryland man charged in $50 million Uranium Finance hack after U.S. seized $31 million in crypto
item.description: Prosecutors say Jonathan Spalletta exploited smart contract bugs twice in April 2021, laundering funds through Tornado Cash and spending proceeds on rare collectibles.

item.title: New supply chain attack this time for npm axios, the most popular HTTP client library with 300M weekly downloads. Scanning my system I found a use imported from googleworkspace/cli from a few days ago when I was experimenting with gmail/gcal cli. The in - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTFBWbDh4SzYzbTlQSHZzYUl4M2k5LWt5UW54enRxNndUZ3ZGOXI0SHRMUVBzRzdFRzE1dW5BZjJwTFA3cnRwSEhfMkF6aXp6dEZxVEVXY3ZRazNWNEkyRWc?oc=5" target="_blank">New supply chain attack this time for n…

item.title: KuCoin operator barred from U.S. after CFTC order, following $297 million DOJ case
item.description: KuCoin operator Peken Global Limited cannot cater to U.S. users on its platform unless it registers as a foreign board of trade.

item.title: Today is a monumentous day for quantum computing and cryptography. Two breakthrough papers just landed (links in next tweet). Both papers improve Shor's algorithm, infamous for cracking RSA and elliptic curve cryptography. The two results compound, op - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE1feXJMUGUydjV6S1ViUVJiU1U1YzNxcUxFWFpfZk9TMlZLQTc0X3NObkZZRHFCV0pDUEx6UmlRWnliNTRleVRpYnB2S1ZtdV9PSGpDclRBRWI4LWhBQXUtLWplOA?oc=5" target="_blank">Today is a monumentous day for q…

item.title: US Charges Hacker Behind $53 Million Uranium Finance Exploit
item.description: The Uranium Finance indictment carries potential prison time of up to 30 years for fraud and money laundering counts.

item.title: Breaking Bitcoin with quantum may be easier than thought, with Taproot partly to blame, Google says
item.description: The findings suggest attackers could one day steal bitcoin mid-transaction, challenging assumptions that the threat is decades away.

item.title: 🚨 CRITICAL: Active supply chain attack on axios -- one of npm's most depended-on packages. The latest axios@1.14.1 now pulls in plain-crypto-js@4.2.1, a package that did not exist before today. This is a live compromise. This is textbook supply chain install - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE94U2pzTDVIdDRFbjdsQkVINjJ5Tjh1Y2JfZk5Ec0hHUVdGN0dfdFNsZWlCOVM5ODQzOTdrOTloVVJRY29OMXNrVVlRcUJNWHNqSDc3YjRHRGxjMGM?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 CRITICAL: Active supply chain attack on …

item.title: Senator Questions SEC Over Treatment of Trump-Linked Crypto Businesses
item.description: Senator Richard Blumenthal wants the agency to answer whether it softened enforcement against allies of President Donald Trump.

item.title: U.S. rule change may open trillions in 401(k) funds to crypto
item.description: The Labor Department on Monday proposed a rule following an executive order from President Donald Trump that directed regulators to expand access to digital assets in retirement portfolios.

item.title: Democrats urge warnings to federal officials against insider bets on prediction markets
item.description: Members of the House and Senate asked the CFTC and federal ethics office to remind government employees it's illegal to make insider derivatives trades.

item.title: Microsoft Made GPT and Claude Work Together—And the Result Beats Every AI Research Tool Out There
item.description: Microsoft's Copilot Researcher now puts GPT and Claude to work in sequence—and the combination just outscored every AI system around.

item.title: Senators Reveal 'Mined in America' Bill to Boost Bitcoin Mining, Support Trump's Reserve
item.description: Sens. Bill Cassidy and Cynthia Lummis introduced legislation to support Bitcoin miners, arguing that the industry needs government help.

item.title: Chainlink Labs, Anchorage Digital Back New Crypto Super PAC Ahead of Midterms
item.description: The Blockchain Leadership Fund is a new hybrid PAC launched to support pro-crypto candidates in the 2026 midterm elections.

item.title: Bitcoin Flashes 'Warning Sign' With Nearly Half of BTC Supply Sitting at a Loss: Report
item.description: Almost half of the Bitcoin supply is sitting at a loss, analysts said, as the top crypto asset remains about 47% off its all-time high.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 US Department of Labor proposes rule that would allow Bitcoin investments in 401(k)s. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE5VT0RRQ284aExzU0hHRlVOWEtEMjN5T0JWbTd4WnFuMkZxOTFuYlI5eDl6YzRLOUJEeWJLcEJacXNGaGJiMFVXMmZiekRHMmJaWlBGMV9vcmx3T2tpUzVETER0YUxjX28?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 US Department…

item.title: Ethereum Foundation Stakes More ETH, Boosting Total to $50 Million
item.description: The Ethereum Foundation staked another $46 million ETH as part of its new treasury plan unveiled last year.
